case_title: PRINCE M EDMONDS VS. LATONYA CARPENTER

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,040.00 FILED BY EDMONDS, PRINCE M AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENTER, LATONYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
